case_title: CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. vs. LUNDY, RONALD et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT LUNDY, RONALD DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUNDY, RONALD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 385 EDDY ST, #103 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL JAN-03-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, EACH PARTIES BEAR OWN ATTY FEES & COSTS. PLAINTIFF SHALL RETAIN DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSITS & WAIVES THE REMAINDER OF DEFENDANT'S SHARE OF RENT & UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUNDY, RONALD

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHINESE COMMUNITY HOUSING CORP. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-08-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 08 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-13-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

#8-JUDGE GEORGE TYLER; D. PADILLA, CSR; P. LEE, CLERK JACQUELINE WOODS, ATTY APPEARING FOR PLT RONALD LUNDAY, APPEARING IN PRO PER 3:10PM C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON RECORD: PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE A JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT, RONALD LUNDY FOR RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 385 EDDY ST, #103 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, LEASE AGREEMENT FORTFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUED, BUT STAY TO NOON TIME ON 1-3-95, NO FURTHER STAY, EACH PARTY BEARS OWN COSTS, SECURITY DEPOSITS DEEMS PROPERTIES OF PLAINTIFF. IF DEFENDANT MOVES OUT BY 1-3-95, PLAINTIFF WILL WAIVE BACK RENTS & DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
